title: Kinetics of Oxidation of some Phenols by Iron(III)-1 ,1 0- Phenanthroline Complex
author: P. V. SUBBA RAO
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Department of Chemistry, Andhra University, Waltair 

  Manuscript received 17 March 1977, revised 29 August 1977 Accepted, 11 October 1977  

 Kinetics of oxidation of phenol,  m -cresol,  p -cresol,  p -bromophenol,  p -chlorophe­nol have been investigated spectrophotometrically at 35°. The reaction obeys first order kinetics in iron(III) ; plots of 1/k 1  versus 1/[1,10-Phenanthroline] 2  and 1/k 1  versus 1/[Substrate] and 1/k 1  versus [HSO -  4 ] 2  are straight lines with positive intercepts on the 1/k 1  axis in each case. The kinetic evidence is in favour of the formation of a mixed ligand complex of iron(III) with 1,10-Phenanthroline and phenol. The reaction gave a good Hammett plot with a  p +   value of -1.6.

The kinetic evidence is in favour of the formation of a mixed ligand complex of iron(III) with 1,10-Phenanthroline and phenol. The reaction gave a good Hammett plot with a  p +   value of -1.6.
